author: Alex Kahn
description: Element-level, cross-page product tour engine for AbsoluteJS apps. A serializable step protocol plus a spotlight positioning engine (pixel-accurate, follows late layout shifts) and a sessionStorage-backed controller that resumes across full-page navigations. Vue + vue-router are peer dependencies.
name: @absolutejs/tour

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts src/manifest.ts --outdir dist --root ./src --sourcemap --external vue --external vue-router && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --project tsconfig.json && absolute-manifest emit
